# services.hoogle

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.hoogle`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.hoogle.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Haskell documentation server. |
| `services.hoogle.extraOptions` | `list of string` | Additional command-line arguments to pass to {command}`hoogle server` |
| `services.hoogle.haskellPackages` | `attribute set` | Which haskell package set to use. |
| `services.hoogle.home` | `string` | Url for hoogle logo |
| `services.hoogle.host` | `string` | Set the host to bind on. |
| `services.hoogle.packages` | `function that evaluates to a(n) list of package` | The Haskell packages to generate documentation for. The option value is a function that takes the package set specified in the {var}`haskellPackages` option as its sole parameter and returns a list of packages. |
| `services.hoogle.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number Hoogle will be listening to. |
